## Job description

### About the role
Set design direction for a critical surface area.

### What you'll do
- Set the product vision in your area
- Mentor other designers
- Influence cross-functional planning

## Application form responses

### Why this company?
Linear's product polish and small remote-first culture both line up with how I work. The bar of craft is what draws me; I get to bring that same care to a team that already expects it.
